»Mother of Assassins« von Rie Shibata

Der Anime entsteht bei P.A.WORKS unter der Regie von Osamu Honma (Ya Boy Kongming!, Mayonaka Punch). Die Serienkomposition übernimmt Yoko Yonaiyama (A Sign of Affection, Akiba Maid War), während das Charakterdesign und die Chief Animation Direction von Yuito Kiyosawa stammen. Für das Gag- und Sub-Charakterdesign sowie ebenfalls die Chief Animation Direction ist Masami Goda verantwortlich.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Als Ausrüstungsverzauberer Rein plötzlich aus seiner Gilde geworfen wird, ist der Grund fast schon lächerlich: Alle Waffen und Rüstungen wurden bereits genug verstärkt. Wütend zieht er die gewaltige Menge Mana zurück, die er über lange Zeit in die Ausrüstung der Gilde gesteckt hat. Als er diese Kraft testweise in ein einfaches Kupferschwert leitet, entsteht daraus eine völlig übermächtige Waffe mit 10.000 Verstärkungspunkten. Ohne Kampferfahrung, aber mit einer Magie, die selbst gewöhnliche Ausrüstung in Cheat-Gear verwandelt, beginnt für Rein ein neues Leben als Abenteurer.

Les évènements récents semblent montrer que les coups et erreurs monumentales tombent aussi sans IA.

Une utilisation raisonnée pourrait permettre de détecter des patterns ou d'améliorer la gestion des priorités, sans prendre la place de l'humain, mais en compensant un peu le manque de moyens.
Après il faudra que les entreprises jouent le jeu, pour leur laisser le temps de réfléchir et de comprendre, voire de brider leur utilisation de l'IA dans un premier temps.

Ce que je constate, c'est que les juniors ont été précurseurs sur l'utilisation de l'IA, pendant que les seniors migraient tranquillement (surtout qu'au début, les modèles étaient bof).

Maintenant on l'utilise tous quotidiennement. Quelqu'un qui n'a que cette corde à son arc n'a plus aucune valeur.

The world of gaming and software development is filled with tools designed to enhance user experience, debug programs, and even cheat in games. In this article, we will delve into the reasons behind this misconception, the actual functionality of Cheat Engine, and the implications of its use.

## Introduction to Cheat Engine

Cheat Engine is a free, open-source software tool that allows users to modify and cheat in video games. It works by scanning the memory of a running game process and modifying specific values, such as health, ammo, or score, to give the player an unfair advantage. The tool is highly customizable and can be used with a wide range of games, making it a popular choice among gamers looking to cheat or simply to experiment with game mechanics.

### How Cheat Engine Works

To understand why Cheat Engine is often mistaken for a virus, it’s essential to grasp how it operates. Cheat Engine uses a combination of memory scanning and code injection to modify game data. It scans the game’s memory for specific values, such as a player’s health, and then allows the user to modify these values. This process can be seen as invasive by some antivirus programs, leading to false positives and the classification of Cheat Engine as malware.

#### Memory Scanning and Code Injection

The memory scanning feature of Cheat Engine is designed to search for specific patterns or values within a game’s memory. This process is not unique to Cheat Engine and is used by many legitimate software tools for debugging and testing purposes. However, when used in the context of cheating, it can raise concerns about the integrity and security of the game and the user’s system. Code injection, on the other hand, involves inserting code into a running program to modify its behavior. While this can be a powerful tool for cheating, it also raises significant security concerns, as it can be used to inject malicious code into a system.

## The Misclassification of Cheat Engine as a Virus

The primary reason Cheat Engine is often misclassified as a virus stems from its ability to modify system and game memory. Antivirus programs, designed to protect systems from malicious software, may flag Cheat Engine as a potential threat due to its invasive nature. Additionally, the tool’s association with cheating and the potential for it to be used maliciously contribute to its negative reputation.

### Antivirus Responses to Cheat Engine

Different antivirus programs respond to Cheat Engine in various ways. Some may flag it as a **potentially unwanted program (PUP)** or **potentially unwanted application (PUA)** , while others may classify it as a full-fledged virus or malware. This variability in response is due to the different algorithms and criteria used by antivirus software to determine what constitutes a threat. It’s worth noting that Cheat Engine itself is not inherently malicious and does not contain viruses or malware. However, its use can potentially open a system to security risks if not used carefully.

#### Security Risks Associated with Cheat Engine

While Cheat Engine is not a virus, its use can pose several security risks. The most significant risk is the potential for **system instability** caused by modifying game or system memory. Additionally, downloading Cheat Engine from untrusted sources can lead to the installation of actual malware. It’s crucial for users to download software from official or trusted sources and to be aware of the potential risks associated with using tools like Cheat Engine.

Reddit, a popular social news and discussion website, has numerous communities dedicated to gaming and software development. The perception of Cheat Engine as a virus is also prevalent, with many users warning others about its potential risks. These discussions highlight the complexity of the issue and the need for a balanced understanding of what Cheat Engine is and what it is not.

This aspect of Cheat Engine is often overlooked in discussions about its legitimacy but is an important part of its overall value.

Cheat Engine, while often misclassified as a virus on Reddit and other platforms, is a complex tool with a variety of uses and implications. Its ability to modify game memory and potentially destabilize systems has led to its negative reputation, but it is essential to understand that Cheat Engine itself is not malicious. Instead, it is a tool that can be used for both positive and negative purposes, depending on the user’s intentions. By recognizing the actual nature and functionality of Cheat Engine, we can work towards a more nuanced discussion about its use and the broader issues of cheating, game development, and software security.

I'm thoroughly surprised that ChatGPT 5.5 actually can write Prolog (and it only took 2 exchanges to make it look NOT like a syntax vomit).

Not a toy problem (Literate Markdown/Prolog Runner) within tidy 110 lines of code. Paint me impressed.

I'll pub soon at github.com/exlee/prolog...

...and in the end I tend to swear* often at Claude**, rarely at ChatGPT. 

*I don't worry about LLMs becoming sentient killing machines. We have such great rapport; I'll be vaporized in a jiffy 😶‍🌫️

**... and other models. I think it might be worth making an actual metric 😄

I find ChatGPT/Codex much more pleasant to use than Claude/Claude Code. 

Context: I create test.txt during agent run.

Claude: new file! update README! write test_test.txt! groom it! lint it!

ChatGPT: oh. user has some test file. Better not touchy touchy.

コミュニティのプライバシーレベルは、公開、招待制、非公開の3種類。また、各コミュニティには独自のフィードが用意されるという

ベンザー氏のこの投稿は、先週BlueskyのローズCOOが、Blueskyは「公共の広場」という立場から脱却したいと考えており、「Redditのような企業から大きなインスピレーションを受けている」と述べたことに続くものだ

Metaの「Threads」は現在、コミュニティ機能をテスト中である一方、𝕏は4月に、独自のコミュニティ機能を終了すると発表している

（ざっくり要約おしまい）

[Bluesky：年内に「コミュニティ」機能が登場か（The Verge）]

※ざっくり要約※
Blueskyのプロダクト責任者であるアレックス・ベンザー氏によると、今年中に「コミュニティ」機能を導入するという。これは、より小規模なスペースとして機能し「同じ関心を持つ人たちと深く交流し、交流を深める」ことができる場となる

ベンザー氏によると、コミュニティはURLとしても機能するハンドルが割り当てられ、そのURLにアクセスすると「そのコミュニティ専用のホームページに遷移する」という

（つづく）

[ありのまま撮影のSNS「Setlog」、日本でも急拡大（日経クロステック）]

※ざっくり抜粋※
日本のApp Storeの無料アプリランキングにおいて、米OpenAIの「ChatGPT」や米Googleの「Gemini」など生成AIアプリを差し置いて、2026年5月初旬からほぼ1カ月の間、1位を維持した（2026年6月1日時点）

Setlogは特定の友人とのグループ内で、1時間に1回の通知が来るたびに2秒程度の短い動画を撮影。撮影した動画はグループ内でリアルタイムに投稿・共有できる。1日の終わりには、アプリが動画を時系列順に自動でまとめ、Vlogとして生成する。共有せず1人でも使える

external.description: 今、若年層を中心に新たなSNS「Setlog（セットログ）」が急速に支持を広げている。わずか数カ月で急成長を遂げ、既存のSNSとは異なる体験で注目を集めている。少人数での動画共有という形態で、企業の情報管理の観点から注意が必要だ。

external.description: Главният изпълнителен директор на Anthropic Дарио Амодей публикува есе, озаглавено „Policy on the AI Exponential“ (Политика относно експоненциалния растеж на изкуствения интелект), в което заяви, че времето, в което се задоволявахме само с прозрачност е отминало - най-модерните AI модели на трябва да се регулират толкова строго, колкото самолетите, автомобилите или лекарствата. Заедно с есето Anthropic обяви законодателно предложение за задължително тестване на авангардните AI модели и политическа рамка в случай на масово изместване на работни места - компанията обещава да подкрепи финансово и двете инициативи. Амодей започва с метафора от „Властелинът на пръстените“: политическите институции са Дървобрад, който се поздравява с друго дърво цял ден, докато AI се развива със скоростта на хобитите, които трябва да действат незабавно.
external.title: Шефът на Anthropic призова AI да се регулира по същия начин като лекарствата, авиацията и автомобилите

external.description: OpenAI проучва възможността за значително намаляване на цените на своите ИИ услуги на фона на засилващата се конкуренция с Anthropic. Компанията се опасява, че нейният конкурент също може да прибегне до намаления на цените и затова се готви за потенциална ценова война на пазара на корпоративните AI услуги, съобщава The Wall Street Journal. Според източници на WSJ, запознати със ситуацията, OpenAI обмисля значително намаление на цените за потребителите на своите модели. Този ход би трябвало да помогне на компанията да задържи и привлече корпоративните клиенти, които все по-често сравняват предложенията на OpenAI и Anthropic.

Канадското правителство внесе законопроект за дигитална безопасност, който ще забрани достъпа до социалните медии за деца под 16 години. Законопроектът въвежда и нови разпоредби за ИИ…

external.description: Канадското правителство внесе законопроект за дигитална безопасност, който ще забрани достъпа до социалните медии за деца под 16 години. Законопроектът въвежда и нови разпоредби за ИИ чатботовете и създаването на специален дигитален регулатор, съобщава Reuters. Законопроектът за дигитална безопасност беше внесен в канадския парламент на 10 юни. Той предлага забрана на използването на социални медии от деца под 16 години, освен ако платформите не отговарят на специфични стандарти за безопасност на децата. „Целта му е да промени екосистемата на социалните мрежи, за да я направи по-безопасна за децата“, каза доцентът Брет Карауей от Университета в Торонто.

OpenAI afirma que agentes sediados na China estão fomentando a oposição a centros de dados de IA | Tecnologia | Al Jazeera

A OpenAI afirmou que agentes baseados na China provavelmente estão por trás do uso do ChatGPT para "operações de influência secretas" destinadas a fomentar a oposição a centros de dados nos Estados Unido. As contas foram usadas para gerar comentários e imagens em redes sociais que culpavam os centros de dados pelo aumento dos preços da eletricidade em comunidades por todos os Estados Unidos.
“As operações de influência estrangeira há muito tempo procuram se aproveitar de questões locais existentes e crenças sinceras, usando-as para construir credibilidade, ampliar divisões ou exacerbar a desconfiança pública”, disse o criador do ChatGPT.
“Neste caso, os operadores tentaram se inserir secretamente em um debate americano em andamento sobre o futuro das capacidades de IA do país, ocultando suas identidades e motivações.”

external.description: In his speech at the AI Summit in London, Kanishka Narayan, minister for artificial intelligence (AI) and online safety, said the UK government is aiming to make Britain the home for open source AI developers, to mirror the success of the web. In his speech, Narayan spoke about the need for the UK to determine its own AI strategy. “We have to ask honestly, what is the story that we are being told about AI today? Too often, it is a story of AI inevitability. Britain has never accepted that view of progress. We have rejected technological determinism in favour of agency: the agency of our state, the agency of our communities, the agency of our people,” he told delegates attending the headliner stream at the summit. Referencing the invention of the web, he said: “When Tim Berners-Lee made the World Wide Web open, he did something profound. He removed barriers to building. He created a platform that anyone could participate in. external.description: Children and teens across Long Beach will have access to free meals this summer through programs run by the city and Long Beach Unified School District. Beginning June 12, the first day of LBUSD’s summer break, more than 60 locations across Long Beach will begin offering free meals through a federal program administered by the U.S. Department of Agriculture. The sites were selected to serve communities with the greatest need, in accordance with state guidelines. The Department of Parks, Recreation and Marine will host lunch at 23 park and library locations. Children and teens ages 1 to 18 can receive lunches on a first-come, first-served basis and must eat them on site. No registration or proof of income is required. A full list of park locations and their service times and dates is available here. Long Beach Unified will provide breakfast and lunch to more than 8,000 students enrolled in the district’s Expanded Learning Opportunities Program and school-age care programs.
